valid_partitions: submitted -> reviewing -> approved -> label issued -> item received -> refunded
submitted -> reviewing -> approved -> label issued -> item received -> exchanged
label issued and shipped within 14 days
invalid_partitions: rejected directly to approved without new request
shipped after 14-day window but not expired
decision_rules: approved and method = return_by_mail -> LABEL_ISSUED before ITEM_RECEIVED
exception_cases: warehouse receives item after request already expired
